creator: bjk@FreeBSD.org
text: It's pretty surprising that `kdb5_util create` helped your situation, since kdb5_util is an MIT krb5 utility but the rest of your procedures are using Heimdal krb5.  The analogous step to `kdb5_util create` in the Heimdal ecosystem is the `init EXAMPLE.ORG` kadmin interactive command from Section 13.5.1 of the linked https://www.freebsd.org/doc/handbook/kerberos5.html
